ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "value_p1" INTEGER /* Value assigned to image P1 */,
  "value_p2" INTEGER /* Value assigned to image P2 */,
  "block" INTEGER /* Block number for the trial */,
  "inverse_fb" INTEGER /* Inverse feedback flag */,
  "p_number" INTEGER /* Project number */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the trial */,
  "trial_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., training, validation, testing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the animal in the image */,
  "location" TEXT /* File path to the image resource */,
  "micro_category" INTEGER /* Micro category ID of the animal */,
  "macro_category" INTEGER /* Macro category ID of the animal */,
  "id_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence ID for the image */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file (e.g., 5MB) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_source" TEXT /* Source of the image (e.g., field, zoo, archive) */,
  "image_copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_micro_category FOREIGN KEY ("micro_category") REFERENCES micro_categories ("micro_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_macro_category FOREIGN KEY ("macro_category") REFERENCES macro_categories ("macro_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "micro_categories" (
  "micro_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each micro category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the micro category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the micro category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Representative image for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("micro_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "macro_categories" (
  "macro_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each macro category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the macro category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the macro category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Representative image for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("macro_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_images" (
  "trial_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trial-image pair */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "p_number" INTEGER /* Project number */,
  "image_position" TEXT /* Position of the image in the trial (e.g., left, right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_images_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial result */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "match" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the images matched */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "result_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the match (e.g., 0.95) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., physical, behavioral, environmental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_tags_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the image was taken */,
  "photographer" TEXT /* Name of the photographer */,
  "image_license" TEXT /* License under which the image is used */,
  "image_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the image for better searchability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original image */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image relationship */,
  "image_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first image */,
  "image_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second image */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., similar, related species) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the relationship (e.g., 0.85) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_relationships_image_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("image_id_1") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_relationships_image_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("image_id_2") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
